title: milium hispidum
intro: Milium hispidum, also known as hispid milkgrass or Indian grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Milium hispidum are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
